education: Thac si Toan giai tich, Dai hoc Khoa hoc Tu nhien TP.HCM, 2012
summary: Le Minh Khoi has 9 years of experience as a senior mathematics lecturer, specializing in advanced analysis, statistics, and applied mathematics. He excels at integrating theoretical concepts with real-world applications and prefers interactive, logic-based teaching methods. His strong analytical and mentoring skills make him a valuable asset for academic and research environments.
